reacs.QuantHlp: Partial cross section for particle specified

x4freetext: Cross-section SIG was determined from measured angular
distributions dSIG/dOmega fitted by sum of
.Energies of gamma-quanta, spins, parities, energies of
the initial and final states were taken from NuDat3.
Formula (1) was applied for determination of angular
distribution, where n in the denominator of formula (1)
is explained as "the abundance of the isotope on which
the reaction occurred". For contribution of two
reactions Si28(n,inl)Si28 and Si29(n,2n)Si28 in this
Subent it`s not clear what value of n was used -
the abundance of Si28 or sum of abundances Si28 + Si29.
